## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production and discuss the `pry.co` website project.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Production:** GrowthX is ramping up, with 3 articles in production this week. Jon will review all drafts within hours to maintain a high-velocity workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Content will prioritize high-intent keywords (e.g., "card," "banking") over high-volume, low-conversion topics ("expense management"). A 66/33 lower- vs. top-funnel split was proposed.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**`pry.co` Project:** Brex will redesign its `pry.co` domain into a standalone content hub for finance professionals, leveraging its strong backlink profile. The project requires a CMS migration from Prismic to Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Sanity CMS Access:** GrowthX's access is blocked, preventing them from scoping needed improvements like fixing slow publishing and poor search.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Strategic Keyword Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Prioritize high-intent keywords that drive leads over high-volume keywords with low conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [**Example:** Target a keyword with 50 visits/mo → 10 leads, not one with 1,000 visits/mo → 1 lead.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [**Rationale:** "Card" and "banking" topics drive leads; "expense management" does not, despite strong rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Proposed Allocation:** 66% lower-funnel, 33% top-funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Production Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [3 articles in production this week:](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - ["How to create an expense report" (ready for review)](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - ["American Express Platinum vs. Business Platinum" (ready for review)](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - ["Best Software Tools for Automated Account Reconciliation" (in production)](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [\~30 new topics added to the calendar for review.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Do not target "accounts receivable" (per Brex team).](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Review Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Jon will review all drafts within hours to maintain a rapid pace.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Focus:** SEO fundamentals (internal links, URL structure) and overall sanity checks.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

### `pry.co` Website Project

  - [**Goal:** Redesign the `pry.co` domain into a standalone content hub for finance professionals (e.g., CFOs).](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Leverage the domain's strong backlink profile and topical authority on startups.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Redesign:** Strip all product pages and old content; model the new site after `thecfoclub.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**SEO:** Implement 301 redirects to preserve domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [**CMS Migration:** Migrate from Prismic to Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Prismic is difficult to use, especially for programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
          - [**Scope:** Migrate only valuable articles; refresh others.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [**GrowthX Involvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [**Initial:** Assist with the redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [**Future:** Potentially produce content for `pry.co` once the site is live.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [**Priority:** Content production for `brex.com` remains the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

### Sanity CMS Access & Improvements

  - [**Access Status:** GrowthX's Sanity access is blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [**Blocker:** The Brex email and Okta verification are complete, but the user is not added to the Sanity organization.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
      - [**Impact:** Prevents GrowthX from scoping and recommending improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [**Required Improvements (Identified by Jon):**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [**Slow Publishing:** Content takes hours to appear live, hindering quick sanity checks.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
      - [**Poor Search:** "Spend Trends" articles are not searchable from the main Sanity interface.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
      - [**Redirects:** The current setup is functional but complex.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Review the 2 completed articles and 1 refreshed article by tomorrow morning.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Review the \~30 new topic ideas in the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Provide Midjourney prompts for featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [Finalize "Automated Account Reconciliation" article for review by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Resolve Sanity CMS access issues.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
      - [Scope Sanity improvements (publishing speed, search) once access is granted.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call to discuss the `pry.co` redesign strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/QD3c4mg1QxtpLhuV7RZfX3BRx7zFkntu?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
